specializations: Peauvita™ - plant-derived EGF and FGF-2 growth factors
product_highlights: Peauvita™ - unique plant-derived EGF and FGF-2 fused to oleosomes
Vegan-friendly growth factors — no animal or human origin
Oleosome delivery enhances stability and skin penetration
Dual functionality: growth factor activity + lipid delivery
Innovative bridging of biotech actives and delivery systems
notes: US innovator with Peauvita™ — a unique plant-derived EGF and FGF-2 growth factor system fused to oleosomes (natural lipid storage structures). This is a breakthrough product that bridges biotech ingredients and delivery systems: vegan growth factors with built-in lipid delivery. Addresses growing consumer demand for non-animal, non-human growth factor alternatives without sacrificing efficacy.
